title: ContactLog
description: Implementation of the 'ContactLog' model. A contact log.

CreatedDateTime.description: The local date and time when the contact log was created.

FollowupByDate.description: The date by which the assigned staff member should close or follow up on this contact log.

ContactMethod.description: The method by which the client wants to be contacted.

ContactName.description: The name of the client to contact.

Client.description: Information about the client to whom the contact log belongs.

CreatedBy.description: Information about the staff member who created the contact log.

AssignedTo.description: Information about the staff member to whom the contact log is assigned for follow up.

Types.description: Information about the type of contact log.
